title: How to get a police certificate – United Arab Emirates - Canada.ca
content:
## How to get a police certificate – United Arab Emirates
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.

## Name of the document you need
- Police Clearance Certificate (issued by Emirates) or
- Criminal Clearance Certificate (national) or
- Good Conduct Certificate

## Police certificate and IRCC requirements
You must provide a police certificate when you apply for permanent residence in Canada.
You will also be requested to provide a police certificate to Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC) if you declared a criminal record on your application for an electronic travel authorization, work permit or study permit.
- in person or ask a representative (a friend, relative or colleague) in the UAE, with a power of attorney, to apply on your behalf at the police department in your emirate
- online on the Dubai Police website (available in English and Arabic)
- in person at the nearest UAE Embassy

## Special considerations
You only need to give one (1) police clearance from any emirate in the UAE.
United Arab Emirates embassies abroad website (available in English and Arabic)
General Police Directorate Criminal Investigation Section P.O. Box, 253 Abu Dhabi, UAE Telephone: 971-2- 4461461 Abu Dhabi Police website (available in English and Arabic)
Police Clearance Certificate Criminal Investigation Department Dubai Police General Headquarters P.O. Box 1493, Dubai, UAE Telephone: +971 4 609 9999 Email: certificate@dubaipolice.gov.ae Dubai Police General Headquarters website (available in English and Arabic)
Fujairah Police Department P.O. Box 5 Fujairah, UAE Telephone: 971-9-222-4411 Fujairah Police Department website (available in English and Arabic)
Ras Al Kheimah Police P.O. Box 54 Ras Al Kheimah, UAE Telephone: 971-7-235-6666 Ras Al Kheimah Police website (available in English and Arabic)
Sharjah Police P.O. Box 29 Sharjah, UAE Telephone: 971-6-563-3333 Sharjah Police website (available in English and Arabic)
Umm Al Quwain Police Department P.O. Box 23 Umm Al Quwain, UAE Telephone: +971 6 706 2000 Umm Al Quwain Police Department (available in English and Arabic)
Ajman Police Department P.O. Box 4 Ajman, UAE Telephone: +971 6 703 4000 Ajman Police Department website (available in English and Arabic)
